title: facelis retusa subsp. retusa
intro: Facelis retusa subsp. retusa, also known as 'Rough Hawk's-beard', is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, reducing swelling, and fighting off infections. The plant's health benefits extend to treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its ability to regulate gut bacteria and stimulate bowel movements. Herbal preparations of Facelis retusa subsp. retusa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
